xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Chemical production or refinery in closed process without likelihood of exposure or processes with equivalent containment conditions.
xone_alternatives.has_value: Chemical production or refinery in closed process without likelihood of exposure or processes with equivalent containment conditions.

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC1

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Describes the general nature of processes taking place in sectors where the manufacture of substances or production of mixtures takes place or processes with closed process conditions as applied 25 in chemical industry . The closed transfers inherent to the process including closed sampling are included. Open transfers to charge/discharge the system are not included.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Chemical production or refinery in closed continuous process with occasional controlled exposure or processes with equivalent containment conditions
xone_alternatives.has_value: Chemical production or refinery in closed continuous process with occasional controlled exposure or processes with equivalent containment conditions

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC2

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Describes the general nature of processes taking place in sectors where the manufacture of substances or production of mixtures takes place (continuous processes that involve limited manual interventions), or processes with equivalent closed process conditions as applied in chemical industry. The closed transfers inherent to the process including closed sampling are included. Open transfers to charge/discharge the system are not included.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Manufacture or formulation in the chemical industry in closed batch processes with occasional controlled exposure or processes with equivalent containment condition
xone_alternatives.has_value: Manufacture or formulation in the chemical industry in closed batch processes with occasional controlled exposure or processes with equivalent containment condition

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC3

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Describes the general nature of processes taking place in sectors where the manufacture of substances or production of mixtures takes place (batch processes that involve limited manual interventions) or processes with closed process conditions as applied in chemical industry. The closed transfers inherent to the process including closed sampling are included. Open transfers to charge/discharge are not included.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Chemical production where opportunity for exposure arises
xone_alternatives.has_value: Chemical production where opportunity for exposure arises

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC4

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Describes the general nature of processes taking place in sectors where the manufacture of substances or production of mixtures takes place (processes where the nature of the design does not exclude exposure). The closed transfers inherent to the process including closed sampling are included. Open transfers to charge/discharge the system are not included.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Mixing or blending in batch processes
xone_alternatives.has_value: Mixing or blending in batch processes

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC5

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Covers mixing or blending of solid or liquid materials in the context of manufacturing or formulating sectors, as well as upon end use. Charging/discharging of the blending vessel and sampling are considered separate activities and are not included in this PROC.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Calendering operations
xone_alternatives.has_value: Calendering operations

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC6

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Processing of large surfaces at elevated temperature e.g. calendering of textile, rubber or paper

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Industrial spraying
xone_alternatives.has_value: Industrial spraying

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC7

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Air dispersive techniques i.e. dispersion into air (= atomization) by e.g. pressurized air, hydraulic pressure or centrifugation, applicable for liquids and powders. Spraying for surface coating, adhesives, polishes/cleaners, air care products, blasting. The reference to ‘industrial’ means that workers involved have received specific task training, follow operating procedures and act under supervision. Where engineering controls are in place, they are also operated by trained personnel and regularly maintained according to procedures. It is not meant that the activity can only take place at industrial sites.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Transfer of substance or mixture (charging and discharging) at non- dedicated facilities
xone_alternatives.has_value: Transfer of substance or mixture (charging and discharging) at non- dedicated facilities

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC8a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Covers general transferring operations of large quantities of chemicals from/to vessels, containers, installations or machinery without dedicated engineering controls in place for reducing exposure. Transfer includes loading, filling, dumping, bagging and weighing.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Transfer of substance or mixture (charging and discharging) at dedicated facilities
xone_alternatives.has_value: Transfer of substance or mixture (charging and discharging) at dedicated facilities

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC8b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Covers general transferring operations from/to vessels or containers with provision of dedicated engineering controls in place for reducing exposure: it addresses operations where material transfers are undertaken at locations that are specifically designed and operated for the transfer of larger quantities (tens of kilos and higher) of chemicals and where the exposure is primarily related to the un-coupling/coupling activity rather than the transfer itself. Such situations include tanker loading bays and drum filling. Transfer includes loading, filling, dumping, bagging.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Transfer of substance or mixture into small containers (dedicated filling line, including weighing)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Transfer of substance or mixture into small containers (dedicated filling line, including weighing)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC9

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Filling lines specifically designed to both capture vapour and aerosol emissions and minimise spillage. This PROC can also be used to cover sampling operations.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Roller application or brushing
xone_alternatives.has_value: Roller application or brushing

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC10

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This includes application of paints, coatings, removers, adhesives or cleaning agents to surfaces with potential exposure arising from splashes. This PROC can also be assigned to tasks such as cleaning of surfaces using long-handle tools.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Non industrial spraying
xone_alternatives.has_value: Non industrial spraying

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC11

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Air dispersive techniques i.e. dispersion into air (= atomization) by e.g. pressurized air, hydraulic pressure or centrifugation, applicable for liquids and powders. Includes spraying of substances/mixtures for surface coating, adhesives, polishes/cleaners, air care products, blasting. The reference to ‘non-industrial’ is to differentiate where conditions mentioned in PROC7 cannot be met. It is not meant that the activity can only take place at non-industrial sites.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of blowing agents in manufacture of foam
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of blowing agents in manufacture of foam

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC12

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of substances to facilitate the process of production of foams by forming gas bubbles in a liquid mixture. It can be either a continuous or a batch process.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Treatment of articles by dipping and pouring
xone_alternatives.has_value: Treatment of articles by dipping and pouring

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC13

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Treatment of articles by dipping, pouring, immersing, soaking, washing out or washing in substances; Includes handling of treated objects (e.g. from/to treatment basin, after drying, plating). The service life of the article after the treatment needs to be reported separately.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Tabletting, compression, extrusion, pelletisation, granulation
xone_alternatives.has_value: Tabletting, compression, extrusion, pelletisation, granulation

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC14

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This covers processing of mixtures and/or substances into a defined shape for further use.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use as laboratory reagent
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use as laboratory reagent

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC15

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of substances at small scale in laboratories (less than or equal to 1 l or 1 kg present at workplace). Larger operations in laboratories and R+D installations should be treated as industrial processes. This includes the use in quality control processes.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of fuels
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of fuels

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC16

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Covers the use of (solid and liquid) fuel (including additives), including transfers via the closed system, where limited exposure to the product in its unburned form is expected. Assignment of PROC 8 or PROC 9 not needed in this case. The exposure to exhaust gases is not covered.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Lubrication at high energy conditions in metal working operations
xone_alternatives.has_value: Lubrication at high energy conditions in metal working operations

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC17

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Covers metal working processes where the lubricants are exposed to high temperature and friction e.g. metal rolling/forming processes, drilling and grinding, etc. Transfers for refilling or discharging from/to reservoirs are not covered.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: General greasing /lubrication at high kinetic energy conditions
xone_alternatives.has_value: General greasing /lubrication at high kinetic energy conditions

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC18

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of lubricant or greasing agents in high kinetic energy conditions, including manual application. It does not refer to any filling operation.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Manual activities involving hand contact
xone_alternatives.has_value: Manual activities involving hand contact

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC19

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Addresses tasks, where exposure of hands and forearms can be expected; no dedicated tools or specific exposure controls other than PPE can be put in place. Examples are manual mixing of cement and plasters in construction works or mixing of hair dyes and bleaches.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Use of functional fluids in small devices
xone_alternatives.has_value: Use of functional fluids in small devices

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC20

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Includes the filling and emptying of systems containing functional fluids (including transfers via the closed system) e.g. heat and pressure transfer fluids; takes place on routine basis Example: charging and discharging of motor and engine oils, brake fluids, home appliances. Assignment of PROCs 8-9 not needed in this case.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Low energy manipulation and handling of substances bound in/on materials or articles
xone_alternatives.has_value: Low energy manipulation and handling of substances bound in/on materials or articles

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC21

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Cover activities such as manual cutting, cold rolling or assembly/disassembly of material/article. It can also be used for handling/transfer of massive (metal) objects.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Manufacturing and processing of minerals and/or metals at substantially elevated temperature
xone_alternatives.has_value: Manufacturing and processing of minerals and/or metals at substantially elevated temperature

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC22

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Describes the general nature of processes taking place at smelters, furnaces, refineries, ovens, excluding casting, tapping and drossing operations. When the temperature has decreased , the handling of the cool material can be covered by PROC21 or PROC26.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Open processing and transfer operations at substantially elevated temperature
xone_alternatives.has_value: Open processing and transfer operations at substantially elevated temperature

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC23

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Describes certain processes taking place at smelters, furnaces and ovens: casting, tapping and drossing operations. Covers also hot dip galvanising raking of melted solids in paving and water granulation. When the temperature has decreased, the handling of the cold material can be covered by PROC21 or PROC26.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: High (mechanical) energy work-up of substances bound in /on materials and/or articles
xone_alternatives.has_value: High (mechanical) energy work-up of substances bound in /on materials and/or articles

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC24

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Substantial thermal or kinetic energy applied to substance by e.g. hot rolling/forming, grinding, mechanical cutting, drilling or sanding, stripping.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Other hot work operations with metals
xone_alternatives.has_value: Other hot work operations with metals

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC25

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Welding, soldering, gouging, brazing, flame cutting.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Handling of solid inorganic substances at ambient temperature
xone_alternatives.has_value: Handling of solid inorganic substances at ambient temperature

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC26

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Transfer and handling of ores, concentrates, metals and other inorganic substances in solid (but not massive) potentially dusty form. Assignment of PROC8a, PROC8b or PROC9 not needed in this case. The handling of massive objects should be addressed with PROC21.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Production of metal powders (hot processes)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Production of metal powders (hot processes)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC27a

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Production of metal powders by hot metallurgical processes (atomisation, dry dispersion).

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Production of metal powders (wet processes)
xone_alternatives.has_value: Production of metal powders (wet processes)

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC27b

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Production of metal powders by wet metallurgical processes (electrolysis, wet dispersion).

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Manual maintenance (cleaning and repair) of machinery
xone_alternatives.has_value: Manual maintenance (cleaning and repair) of machinery

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC28

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Covers maintenance activities for uses where the maintenance is not already included in any of the other process categories. The category covers for example: 1. activities when closed systems are opened and potentially entered for cleaning; 2. generally dedicated/separate cleaning tasks conducted on a shift or less frequent basis (e.g. between individual production batches); 3. removal of splashes around the machinery removal of filters or material from filters; 4. cleaning of floors that are not directly around the machinery, but still need cleaning for instance because of dust deposition when handling a dusty product

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Other
xone_alternatives.has_value: Other

xone_alternatives.label: Code
xone_alternatives.has_value: PROC0
